case_title: SHALMAN, ANATOLY VS MULROONEY, BRIAN DBA "MULROONEY CONSTRUCTION "

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHALMAN, ANATOLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MULROONEY, BRIAN DBA "MULROONEY CONSTRUCTION " $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $37.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,037.00, PLTF HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID $300 BALANCE DUE IS $1700 FOR A TOTAL OF $2000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT MULROONEY, BRIAN DBA "MULROONEY CONSTRUCTION " HEARING SET FOR MAR-15-1995 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT C
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAR-05-1995 AS TO DEFENDANT MULROONEY, BRIAN DBA "MULROONEY CONSTRUCTION "
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR SHALMAN, ANATOLY ASSIGNED TO I. DAY CO., INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY SHALMAN, ANATOLY AS TO DEFENDANT MULROONEY, BRIAN DBA "MULROONEY CONSTRUCTION " ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MULROONEY, BRIAN DBA "MULROONEY CONSTRUCTION "
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTY FOR ASSIGNEE OF RECORD FILED. NEW LEGAL REPRESENTATIVE IS THOMAS P. WRIGHT, JR. COPY OF DOCUMENT IN FILE # 809899.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,603.10 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT MULROONEY, BRIAN DBA "MULROONEY CONSTRUCTION "
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAR-15-1995, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT MULROONEY, BRIAN DBA "MULROONEY CONSTRUCTION "
